tasks.title: Set up Telegram bot with grammY and long polling
Implement SQLite schema for users, events, duels, predictions, stakes, and leaderboard view
Create resolver job with tick logic for auto-resolution and restart resilience
Implement per-chat state machine for user flows (idle → new_duel → ... → confirming)
Handle user registration/authentication via /start with reputation initialization
Implement /newduel flow with event type selection, source_kind/source_ref handling, and deadline validation
Implement /predict flow with re-predict replacement logic, deadline race checks, and stake locking
Implement /duels command with timezone-aware rendering and event type filters
Implement /leaderboard with reputation floor enforcement (0 minimum) and rank calculation
Implement /admin_resolve and /admin_event with manual resolution/cancellation and event creation
Integrate crypto (CoinGecko), sports (API-Sports), and weather (OpenWeatherMap) APIs for event resolution
